title: Instagram Highlights Scraper
description: Scrape Instagram highlights from one or more public accounts.

usernames.title: Instagram Usernames
usernames.description: List of Instagram usernames to scrape (without the @ symbol).

maxRetries.title: Max Retries per Username
maxRetries.description: How many times to retry a username if the request fails.

delayBetweenRequestsMs.title: Delay Between Requests (ms)
delayBetweenRequestsMs.description: Milliseconds to wait between requests to avoid rate limiting.
